ddls:
CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the image content */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the image */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the image location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the image location */,
  "pov_exp" INTEGER /* POV (Point of View) experience level */,
  "heading" INTEGER /* Heading or orientation of the image */,
  "org_id" REAL /* Organization ID associated with the image */,
  "nid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the image node */,
  "captions" TEXT /* Captions describing the image */,
  "scene" TEXT /* Scene description of the image */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label assigned to the image for classification */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" REAL /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organization */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_captions" (
  "caption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caption */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the caption describes */,
  "caption_text" TEXT /* Text of the caption */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the caption was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the caption was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_captions_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the label was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_scenes" (
  "scene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scene description */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the scene describes */,
  "scene_text" TEXT /* Text of the scene description */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scene description was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the scene description was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_scenes_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., annotator, reviewer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being annotated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., tag, label, caption) */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation being updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., add, edit, delete) */,
  "change_text" TEXT /* Text of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_history_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotation_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image the feature belongs to */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_features_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_similarity" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity entry */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the image being compared */,
  "similar_image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the similar image */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the two images */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the similarity entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the similarity entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_similarity_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES images ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_image_similarity_similar_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("similar_image_id") REFERENCES images ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_explainability" (
  "explainability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each explainability entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "feature_importance" TEXT /* Feature importance for the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the explainability entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the explainability entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("explainability_id")
)
